title: Parkio Daily for June 29, 2026
teaser: Level99 opens at Disney Springs today; transportation verification now required for resort buses and boats from Disney Springs.

rides.name: Toy Story Mania
rides.note: Early morning waits typically under 30 minutes

rides.name: Living with the Land
rides.note: Relaxing indoor ride, good heat break

breaking.title: Level99 opens at Disney Springs
breaking.body: The real-world gaming venue with 63 physical and mental challenges opens at 11am today on the West Side, replacing the NBA Experience. This is the company's largest location to date.

parkioInsight.text: Opening day crowds tend to peak between noon and 3pm. Arriving right at 11am or after 6pm usually means shorter wait times for popular challenges.

breaking.title: Heat advisory in effect across Orlando through 7pm
breaking.body: Actual temperatures will hit mid-to-upper 90s today, with feel-like temps pushing the National Weather Service to issue an advisory from noon to 7pm.

parkioInsight.text: Indoor attractions like Living with the Land and Carousel of Progress offer the longest air-conditioned relief. Plan outdoor rides before 11am or after 7pm when heat stress risk drops.

bignews.title: Disney Springs transportation verification now in effect
bignews.body: Guests using buses and boats from Disney Springs to resorts must now verify a hotel reservation, dining booking, or activity reservation. The official website has been updated with verification requirements.

parkioInsight.text: If you're planning a resort-hopping dining trip, bring confirmation emails on your phone. Verification typically adds 2-3 minutes per party at the bus stop, so allow extra buffer time.

bignews.title: Magic Kingdom adds crowd barriers ahead of July 4 weekend
bignews.body: Green crowd control barriers have been installed around Magic Kingdom security checkpoints to manage guest flow during the busy holiday week.

parkioInsight.text: Security lines tend to swell between 9-11am during holiday weeks. Arriving at rope drop or using the Contemporary monorail entrance after 2pm often cuts security wait by 10-15 minutes.

bignews.title: New Moana merchandise collection launches ahead of film release
bignews.body: A collection of toys, books, accessories, and apparel inspired by the live-action Moana film arrives at Disney parks ahead of the July 10 theatrical debut.

parkioInsight.text: Limited-edition character merchandise typically sells fastest at World of Disney in Disney Springs and Emporium on Main Street. Visiting before 11am usually ensures best selection.

topstories.title: Comcast to spin off NBCUniversal and theme parks
topstories.body: Comcast announced it will separate NBCUniversal, including its theme park division, and Sky into two publicly traded companies. The separation is expected to take one year.

parkioInsight.text: Corporate restructuring typically doesn't affect day-to-day park operations for months. If you've been considering a Universal trip, current pricing and policies are likely stable through fall.

topstories.title: Art of Animation Resort faces widespread closures in 2027
topstories.body: Disney confirmed significant refurbishment work will close portions of Art of Animation Resort next year, though specific dates and affected buildings have not been announced.

parkioInsight.text: If Art of Animation is your preferred Value resort, booking trips before early 2027 usually avoids construction noise and reduced amenity access. Monitor Disney's official site for closure dates.

topstories.title: Disney Lakeshore Lodge construction continues at Bay Lake
topstories.body: The nature-inspired resort on the former River Country site between Wilderness Lodge and Fort Wilderness is under active construction, with vertical building now visible from the water.

parkioInsight.text: Wilderness Lodge boat service may experience occasional short delays near construction zones. Allow an extra 5-10 minutes if using boats to reach Magic Kingdom during morning rush.

topstories.title: Living with the Land branch falls near guest boat at EPCOT
topstories.body: An artificial tree branch detached from the ceiling during a recent ride cycle, landing close to a guest boat but causing no reported injuries. The attraction remained operational.

parkioInsight.text: Disney typically completes safety inspections within 24 hours of incidents. If you're concerned, asking a Cast Member at load about recent maintenance checks often provides reassurance.

topstories.title: Select California Adventure restaurants closed certain July days
topstories.body: One popular dining location at Disney California Adventure will operate on a reduced schedule with select closures throughout July, though the specific restaurant and dates were not detailed in available reports.

parkioInsight.text: Check the Disneyland app each morning for real-time dining availability. Walk-up lists at Lamplight Lounge and Storytellers Cafe tend to move fastest during early lunch (11-11:30am).

topstories.title: Captain Jack Sparrow entertainment added to Halloween party
topstories.body: New Captain Jack Sparrow character experiences will debut at Mickey's Not So Scary Halloween Party this year, with the first event scheduled for early August.

parkioInsight.text: Character experiences at Halloween parties typically see shortest lines during the first parade at 8:15pm. Arriving at the location 20 minutes early often secures front-of-line access.

icymi.title: EPCOT Festival of the Holidays dates announced
icymi.body: The 2026 EPCOT International Festival of the Holidays presented by AdventHealth will return this winter with holiday kitchens, storytellers, and Candlelight Processional performances.

icymi.title: Disney releases 2026 holiday merchandise preview
icymi.body: A first look at seasonal products for the 2026 holiday season includes ornaments, apparel, and collectibles available at parks and Disney Springs starting later this year.

icymi.title: Floral princess keychains arrive at World of Disney
icymi.body: A five-piece keychain set featuring Rapunzel, Tiana, Belle, and two additional princesses on colored flowers with rose gold chains is now available for $29.99.

spotlight.title: Cool down with ice cream across Disneyland Resort
spotlight.body: Summer heat makes ice cream, slushies, and frozen treats essential. The Parks Blog highlights top locations including Clarabelle's, Gibson Girl, and Plaza Inn for classic soft-serve, plus specialty frozen options throughout both parks.

parkioInsight.text: Ice cream kiosks near Main Street and Buena Vista Street tend to have 15-20 minute waits between 2-4pm. Hitting stands right at park open or after 7pm usually means walk-up service.

videos.summary: Paging Mr. Morrow tours the new Level99 gaming venue at Disney Springs and covers recent updates including new Gideon's cookies and other changes around the shopping and dining district.
